title: Inner Ferro systems
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Inner Ferro systems''' included the [[Ferro system/Legends|Ferro system]]. Settled by reclusive [[Human/Legends|Humans]], they were members of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], though they did not always obey its laws. [[Ferro]] was the system's capital.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]''
